north_star: Demonstrate causally that retaining decision-relevant experience across recurrent campaigns improves cold-start resilience after a complete physical reset.
historical_boundary: Program Q remains frozen: learned feedback beat the complete 65536-calendar open-loop frontier and was practically equivalent to belief-MPC, without neural premium or worst-product safety certification.
selection_rule: The north star selects prospective experiments; it never predetermines their verdict.
